title: Non-Emergency Medical Transportation * AIDS/HIV - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Non-Emergency Medical Transportation * AIDS/HIV 8 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Older Adults AIDS/HIV Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF DESCHUTES COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH HIV/AIDS CASE MANAGEMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides confidential case management to individuals living with HIV and AIDS. This program provides expense assistance for HIV medications, transportation costs to medical care appointments, insurance premium payments, transitional housing and rent payment assistance, dental care, disease management education, referrals to other agencies for basic needs, employment, and substance abuse treatment. 2577 NE Courtney Drive Bend, OR 97701 Eligibility: Individuals living with HIV/AIDS Hours: Monday-Friday 8:00am-5pm Email (541) 322-7155 Get Directions Visit Website More Details EASTERN OREGON CENTER FOR INDEPENDENT LIVING BURNS HIV COMMUNITY SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides confidential case management independent living services to individuals living with HIV.
